title: Review: round 3 post-fix
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — All critical correctness bugs fixed in prior rounds (non-atomic file write, non-Zeroizing copy in put, misleading doppler comment, pkcs11 sync documentation, local-signing missing dispatch arm, aws-kms unverified signatures). No new correctness bugs found in round 3.
Confidence: 5% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: integration-tested backends (aws-sm, aws-ssm, aws-kms, vault, pkcs11) may have real-service edge cases not exercised in unit tests; bitwarden/doppler/azure-kv/gcp-sm never ran against live services. Would raise confidence if: all network backends had been integration-tested against real services at least once.
